rationale: Trump's Iran settlement claim could ease energy costs marginally for Romania; Black Sea/Ukraine war continues without new escalation near Romanian borders.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', cancels strikes
top_events.summary: Potential oil price relief could ease Romanian energy costs; stock market surge positive for EU economic stability.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Lebanon and Gaza overnight
